ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lepidoptera" (
  "lepidoptera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Lepidoptera species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the species is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lepidoptera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lepidoptera_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_plants" (
  "hostplant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host plant */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the host plant */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the host plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Common name of the host plant */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the host plant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the host plant */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the host plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hostplant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_hostplants" (
  "species_hostplant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species-host plant relationship */,
  "lepidoptera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Lepidoptera species */,
  "hostplant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host plant */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction between the species and host plant */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_hostplant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_hostplants_lepidoptera_id FOREIGN KEY ("lepidoptera_id") REFERENCES lepidoptera ("lepidoptera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_hostplants_hostplant_id FOREIGN KEY ("hostplant_id") REFERENCES host_plants ("hostplant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "lepidoptera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Lepidoptera species accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_lepidoptera_id FOREIGN KEY ("lepidoptera_id") REFERENCES lepidoptera ("lepidoptera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_lepidoptera" (
  "project_lepidoptera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-Lepidoptera relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "lepidoptera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Lepidoptera species associated with the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the Lepidoptera species in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_lepidoptera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_lepidoptera_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_lepidoptera_lepidoptera_id FOREIGN KEY ("lepidoptera_id") REFERENCES lepidoptera ("lepidoptera_id")
)
